name: /promote-standard rejects an unknown section identifier within a known source
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'sections:\n  5.2.4: x\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 99.99.99 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_section' err.txt && grep -q '99.99.99' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
